_doc.purpose: ComfyUI pixel-portrait pipeline for undertale-vera's 'Determination Chronicle' style. Ported from fft-psx-vera/comfy_workflows/portrait.json (Illustrious-XL + LoRA + BiRefNet bg-removal + scale + save), retuned for museum-lit PIXEL character portraits in OUR accent (obsidian field, ember/brass warmth, reinterpreted soul-sigil framing). Do NOT use Undertale assets; this trains/uses a NEW style LoRA.
_doc.style: Determination Chronicle — relic-framed pixel portrait, obsidian background, ember/brass museum lighting, restrained Determination-red accent.
_doc.prompt_approach: Positive: 'determination_chronicle_style, pixel art character portrait, {character} of the Underground, bust framing, museum-lit, warm ember and brass rim light, deep obsidian background, expressive face, looking at viewer'. Negative: 'red heart icon, copyrighted undertale sprite, watermark, text, signature, frame, extra limbs, blurry, full body, hands'. Reserve Determination-red for soul/route beats only.
_doc.outputs: 512x512 transparent PNG; saved to static/assets/portraits/ (GITIGNORED). Generate 2-3 sample relic portraits only — do not batch the full cast.

inputs.text: determination_chronicle_style, pixel art character portrait, bust framing, museum-lit, warm ember and brass rim light, deep obsidian background, expressive face, looking at viewer
red heart icon, copyrighted undertale sprite, watermark, text, signature, frame, weapon, extra limbs, extra fingers, blurry, full body, hands, deformed
